do_not_merge.reason: Records represent distinct entity types: 'government_official' (person: Eduardo del Valle, DDC Acting Commissioner) vs 'government_agency' (NYC Department of Design and Construction). The shared identity keys and aliases (entity_nyc-ddc, entity_nyc-department-of-design-and-construction) were incorrectly assigned to the person record. An agency and a person who works for that agency are related but not the same canonical identity.

suggested_rules: Do not merge person (government_official) records with agency (government_agency) records solely on shared agency name or abbreviation identity keys. The agency name in a person record's agency_name field is affiliation context, not identity equivalence.
rationale: Payload identity fields clearly distinguish Eduardo del Valle (entity_type: government_official) from NYC Department of Design and Construction (entity_type: government_agency). The duplicate detection fired because the person record's aliases/identity_keys included entity_nyc-ddc, but the authoritative identity fields confirm different canonical identities. No merge is warranted.
